hero_subtitle: SFTY connects compliance data and regulatory rules into one audit-ready workflow to give banks clear visibility and control during VASP due diligence.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Bank due diligence lacks centralized insight
problem_description: Banks face delays and increased risk when VASP compliance information remains scattered across separate systems. This fragmentation reduces operational visibility, weakens audit readiness and complicates defensible risk decisions during partner onboarding.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY connects VASP data, provider outputs, case workflows and audit evidence into a unified operating layer for banks to streamline due diligence and enhance risk visibility and decision clarity.
workflow_title: From onboarding checks to bank approval
workflow_description: SFTY connects onboarding provider checks through risk review, case management, decision logging and evidence collection for clearer bank due diligence.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Not another dashboard. One compliance view
why_sfty_description: SFTY gives executives a provider-neutral layer that connects due diligence data into audit-ready cases, decisions and evidence for clearer risk control and reporting.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY equips banks and VASPs with a governed compliance layer that supports audit-ready evidence and operational clarity for bank due diligence workflows.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for bank due diligence?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides banks with a connected compliance view for VASP due diligence, connecting identity, wallets, transactions and regulatory data into structured evidence for clearer risk assessment.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY support VASP risk workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY structures fragmented VASP risk data into cohesive workflows, routing alerts, linking cases, capturing decisions and supporting compliance reviews for efficient risk control.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves detailed case history, decision logs and linked evidence to support audit readiness and traceable compliance records for banking partner reviews.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY connects with existing KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers to connect outputs without disrupting current compliance ecosystems.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace current compliance providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY complements existing providers by consolidating their outputs into operational workflows, without replacing the foundational compliance tools.
final_title: Prepare audit-ready evidence for VASP due diligence
final_description: Review how SFTY structures bank due diligence workflows with connected provider data, regulatory rules and compliance decisions.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
